--- page 5 ---
SURGICAL PATHOLOGY REPORT (SYNTHETIC)
Accession: SP-26-00417   Collected: 01/29/2026   Pathologist: Frost, Alan MD

Final Diagnosis:
  Bone marrow, biopsy and aspirate — hypocellular marrow with markedly decreased
  megakaryocytes, consistent with the clinical picture of thrombocytopenia.
  Cannot rule out an evolving primary marrow process; correlation advised.

Gross Description:
  Received in formalin, a single core of tan-red bone, 1.4 cm in aggregate.

Microscopic Description:
  Sections show a hypocellular marrow (approximately 20% cellularity for age).
  Megakaryocytes are markedly reduced. Erythroid and myeloid maturation preserved.

Flow Cytometry:
  No aberrant population identified. No increase in CD34-positive blasts.

Addendum (02/03/2026):
  Reviewed with hematology; findings support the reported thrombocytopenia.
